calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Vadim Alden, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Friends of New College LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ashwin Nadim, was placed under oath and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Peter Mackenzie dba Maverick Construction as follows:

Damages/Principal - $72,796.06
Pre-judgment Interest - $5,423.68
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $7,8629.74

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
